heading: List All Export Buckets
body:
To retrieve all the AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) Buckets, Azure Blob Storage Containers, or
Google Cloud Storage buckets to which Atlas exports snapshots, send a
`GET` request to the Cloud Backups
[endpoint](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-listgroupbackupexportbuckets).
